mapper.select: SELECT A.EMP_ID, A.EMP_NM, A.DEPT_CD, A.EMP_PROFILE, A.EMP_JBGD , B.DEPT_NM , ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PROJECT C, PROJECT_PARTICIPANT D WHERE C.PROJ_NO = D.PROJ_NO AND D.EMP_ID = A.EMP_ID AND C.PROJ_STTS = '진행' ) AS PROJECT_COUNT FROM EMPLOYEE A LEFT OUTER JOIN DEPARTMENT B ON A.DEPT_CD = B.DEPT_CD WHERE A.EMP_ROLE = '사원' AND A.EMP_STTS = 'Y'

SELECT P.PROJ_NO, P.EMP_ID, P.PROJ_TTL, P.PROJ_BGNG_DT, P.PROJ_END_DT, P.PROJ_STTS, P.PROJ_DTL, P.PROJ_COLOR, P.PROJ_IPT, P.PROJ_NM, (SELECT ROUND(AVG(TASK_PRGRT)) FROM TASK T WHERE T.PROJ_NO = P.PROJ_NO) AS projPrgrt,
CASE WHEN SYSDATE < P.PROJ_BGNG_DT THEN 0 WHEN SYSDATE > P.PROJ_END_DT THEN 100 ELSE ROUND((SYSDATE - P.PROJ_BGNG_DT) / (P.PROJ_END_DT - P.PROJ_BGNG_DT) * 100) END AS TIME_PRGRT,
M.EMP_ID AS PRTPNT_ID , M.PRTPNT_NM FROM PROJECT P LEFT OUTER JOIN PROJECT_PARTICIPANT M ON (P.PROJ_NO = M.PROJ_NO) WHERE P.EMP_ID = #{empId} ORDER BY P.PROJ_NO DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_PROJECT.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO PROJECT (PROJ_NO, EMP_ID, PROJ_TTL, PROJ_BGNG_DT, PROJ_END_DT , PROJ_STTS, PROJ_DTL, PROJ_COLOR, PROJ_IPT, PROJ_NM) VALUES (#{projNo},#{empId}, #{projTtl}, #{projBgngDt}, #{projEndDt} , '진행', #{projDtl}, #{projColor}, 'N', #{projNm})

INSERT ALL
INTO PROJECT_PARTICIPANT (PROJ_NO, EMP_ID, PRTPNT_NM) VALUES (#{item.projNo}, #{item.empId}, #{item.prtpntNm})
SELECT * FROM DUAL
mapper.update:
UPDATE PROJECT
PROJ_IPT = 'N'
PROJ_IPT = 'Y'
WHERE PROJ_NO = #{projNo}
mapper.select: SELECT P.*, T.*, TP.*, PP.*, E2.EMP_NM AS EMP_NM, TP.EMP_ID AS PART_EMP_ID, PP.EMP_ID AS PRT_EMP_ID, T.EMP_ID AS TASK_EMP_ID, T.PROJ_NO AS TASK_PROJ_NO, (SELECT NVL(ROUND(AVG(TASK_PRGRT)), 0) FROM TASK T WHERE T.PROJ_NO = P.PROJ_NO) AS projPrgrt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TASK_PARTICIPANT TP WHERE T.TASK_NO = TP.TASK_NO) AS taskCnt FROM PROJECT P LEFT OUTER JOIN PROJECT_PARTICIPANT PP ON P.PROJ_NO = PP.PROJ_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON E.EMP_ID = P.EMP_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TASK T ON T.PROJ_NO = P.PROJ_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN TASK_PARTICIPANT TP ON T.TASK_NO = TP.TASK_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN EMPLOYEE E2 ON TP.EMP_ID = E2.EMP_ID WHERE E.DEPT_CD = #{deptCd} ORDER BY P.PROJ_END_DT ASC

SELECT P.PROJ_NO , P.PROJ_TTL , P.PROJ_BGNG_DT , P.PROJ_END_DT ,(SELECT ROUND(AVG(TASK_PRGRT)) FROM TASK T WHERE T.PROJ_NO = P.PROJ_NO) AS projPrgrt FROM PROJECT P LEFT OUTER JOIN PROJECT_PARTICIPANT PT ON P.PROJ_NO = PT.PROJ_NO WHERE PT.EMP_ID = #{empId} AND P.PROJ_STTS = '진행' ORDER BY P.PROJ_END_DT
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PROJECT_PARTICIPANT (EMP_ID, PROJ_NO, PRTPNT_NM) VALUES (#{empId}, #{projNo}, #{prtpntNm})
mapper.select: SELECT PROJ_TTL FROM PROJECT WHERE PROJ_NO = #{projNo}
